# comfyui_prompt_validation (Data Source)

Validates native ComfyUI prompt JSON against live /object_info metadata.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `json` (String) Optional raw ComfyUI prompt JSON string.
- `path` (String) Optional file path to load prompt JSON from.

### Read-Only

- `error_count` (Number) Number of validation errors.
- `errors` (List of String) Validation errors reported as plain strings.
- `normalized_json` (String) Normalized ComfyUI prompt JSON.
- `valid` (Boolean) Whether the prompt passed semantic validation.
- `validated_node_count` (Number) Number of prompt nodes inspected during validation.
- `warning_count` (Number) Number of validation warnings.
- `warnings` (List of String) Validation warnings reported as plain strings.
